Getting started

Installation

pip install aPrioriDNS

Quick example

import aPrioriDNS as ap

# Download the dataset
ap.download()

field_DNS = ap.Field3D('Lifted_H2_subdomain')

field_DNS.plot_z_midplane(
    'T',
    levels=[1400, 2000],
    vmin=1400,
    title='T [K]',
    linewidth=2,
    transpose=True,
    x_name='y [mm]',
    y_name='x [mm]',
)
